required_preferences.fact: Now accepts interdepartmental integration meetings as early as 8:30am to coordinate with new teams in the merged organization — incident triage is shifted to later in the morning as needed

supersedes.fact: Blocks off early mornings for high-priority incident triage — never schedules meetings before 10am

required_preferences.fact: Prefers in-person discussions for project updates and team coordination at the office — avoids email and messaging except for urgent outages or after-hours incidents

supersedes.fact: Prefers asynchronous communication for updates — avoids phone calls unless dealing with outages

required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes facilitating group video calls with his kids and nieces when his brother is traveling, ensuring both families participate together at least once per week
Relaxed bike rides through the neighborhood twice a week — never cycles on main roads
Completes a short mindfulness meditation after stressful work incidents — never skips this routine even for urgent meetings
Only reads nonfiction books about technology and healthcare — never chooses fiction or fantasy

persona: A senior DevOps engineer managing cloud infrastructure for a healthcare company
